descriptive_rankings.interpretation: descriptive within-cohort ordering only; no inferential, SOTA, global-best, or best-Chinese-model claim
descriptive_rankings.scope: four OpenMed comparators on the same pii_bench_zh closed-8 repair-v2 run

privacy_filter_pre_success_launch_failur.benchmark_access_boundary: the later two failed starts may have completed dataset hash verification; this receipt does not claim that the benchmark was unaccessed
privacy_filter_pre_success_launch_failur.first_failure: the py312 interpreter did not satisfy the locked Snowflake environment
privacy_filter_pre_success_launch_failur.later_two_failures: without pinned-first loading, preloaded Transformers lazy placeholders were rejected
privacy_filter_pre_success_launch_failur.post_run_launcher_status: the separately bound post-run reproducibility launcher is not part of the blind gate and is not represented as a frozen gate
privacy_filter_pre_success_launch_failur.successful_execution: pinned overlay first-load followed by delayed import of the same frozen repair evaluator

hash_contract: SHA-256 of canonical UTF-8 JSON after removing the top-level results_receipt_sha256 field
limitations: The four source reports retain their original v1 report schema and claim flags.
This external receipt binds those immutable aggregate bytes to repair-v2 authorization.
Rankings are descriptive for these four comparators only and carry no SOTA claim.
No uncertainty interval or paired significance test is asserted by this receipt.

multilingual_privacy_filter.canonical_hash_algorithm: SHA-256 of UTF-8 JSON with ensure_ascii=false, keys sorted, and compact comma/colon separators
multilingual_privacy_filter.comparison: original and replay aggregate reports are field-identical after removing only elapsed_seconds
